content:
- Ran the required repository gates after the new README-only novice contract slices: `make check`, `make lint`, and `make test` all passed. Default suite stayed green; `make test-long` remained intentionally not applicable because long-lane selection was unchanged.
- Updated the story-24 task file to `<status>done</status>` and `<passes>true</passes>`, checked off the acceptance criteria with the long-lane note, and ran `.ralph/task_switch.sh` successfully.
- Next: stage all modified files including `.ralph`, commit with the required `task finished ...` message including the passing checks, push, and quit immediately.
